side_effects: Cracca juncea, also known as Stick-tight or Climbing Buckwheat, is a plant with potential side effects due to its toxic compounds. The plant's seeds and leaves contain glycosides, which can be toxic if ingested in large quantities. Consuming large amounts of Cracca juncea can cause symptoms such as nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea.
